title: Earthy Flaky German Flaxseed Crumble
description: This raw-friendly German dish features flaxseeds mixed with coriander leaves for a unique flavor and texture that is perfect for meal prep.

ingredients.name: 1 large ripe avocado
ingredients.notes: ripe for best flavor and texture

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons fresh cilantro leaves (coriander)
ingredients.notes: fresh is key for optimal taste and nutrition

ingredients.name: Handful of sliced almonds or walnuts (optional)

instructions: In a bowl, mix ground flaxseeds and lemon juice thoroughly.
Fold in the avocado slices along with coriander leaves and sea salt.
If desired, sprinkle with optional nuts for additional texture.
